evidence: As a SF buff, found this to be fun.
I like the 'defender of justice' genre.
Predictable story, but it's kind of fun saying, 'I knew that was coming!'
A very poor rendition of a very powerful piece of literature by Jack London.
All the stuff guys love - guns, blowing things up, intricate escape, car chase - and all in the first 30 minutes!
Entertainment for the guys who love suspense.
It's about the story, not the visuals.
Great special effects. A disappointment in that it didn't reach a conclusion.
I like the apocalyptic genre, so I looked forward to viewing this.
Although I'm not big on 'chik fliks' I watched this with my sweetie.
Lots of good special effects with gobs of blowin' stuff up.
Special effects make this film worth watching.
Predictable plot, but in my opinion anything with Morgan Freeman in it is worth watching.
Campy and predictable. Try watching something else.

summary: The user enjoys fast-paced, action-oriented films, particularly in the sci-fi and drama genres. They appreciate visual spectacle but are less concerned with narrative complexity and production quality, often finding stories predictable yet entertaining.
